title: Shree Dev Vyadeshar
tagline: Shree Dev Vyadeshar — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Shree Dev Vyadeshwar temple is a temple dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva.
overview.description: Shree Dev Vyadeshwar temple is a temple dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva. It is in Guhagar town from Ratnagiri District of Maharashtra State in India. The deity is considered as the Kuladevata (Clan-deity) of many Chitpavan families from the Konkan region.

topPlaces.name: Guhagar
topPlaces.description: Guhagar (Marathi pronunciation: [ɡuɦaːɡəɾ]) is a census town in Ratnagiri district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Guhagar is known for its virgin beach, coir items, coconuts, betel nuts and mainly Alphonso mangoes.

topPlaces.name: Durga Devi Temple, Guhagar
topPlaces.description: Durga Devi temple, Guhagar is a temple at Guhagar, a taluka in Ratnagiri district of Maharashtra state in India.

topPlaces.name: Janavale
topPlaces.description: Janavale is a census town in Guhagar taluka. It is about 2 km from Shringartali which is the capital of Guhagar.

topPlaces.name: Velneshwar
topPlaces.description: Velneshwar is a village on the western coast of Maharashtra, India, about 70 kilometres (43 mi) from Ratnagiri. Velneshwar is known for its rock-free beach.

items.note: Guhagar (Marathi pronunciation: [ɡuɦaːɡəɾ]) is a census town in Ratnagiri district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Guhagar is known for its virgin beach, coir items, coconuts, betel nuts and mainly Alphonso mangoes.
Durga Devi temple, Guhagar is a temple at Guhagar, a taluka in Ratnagiri district of Maharashtra state in India.
Janavale is a census town in Guhagar taluka. It is about 2 km from Shringartali which is the capital of Guhagar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shree Dev Vyadeshar?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shree Dev Vyadeshar is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shree Dev Vyadeshar?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (145 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (138 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shree Dev Vyadeshar?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shree Dev Vyadeshar at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shree Dev Vyadeshar?
faq.a: Stays in Shree Dev Vyadeshar start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shree Dev Vyadeshar?
faq.a: The top attractions are Guhagar, Durga Devi Temple, Guhagar, Janavale, Velneshwar.
